findings.message: New pydantic field `widget_timeout_s` (env var `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S` under the APP_ prefix) is consumed in src/demo/config/settings.py but is not declared in .env.example. The framework-managed env surface lists every other APP_ field (APP_ENVIRONMENT, APP_SLO_*, APP_DATABASE_URL, etc.) but omits this one, so the variable is undiscoverable when copying .env.example -> .env and silently relies on the in-code default across DEV->CI->STAGE->PROD instead of being an explicit, per-environment-overridable part of the environment surface.
findings.suggestion: Add `# APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S=5.0` (widget service call timeout in seconds) to .env.example so the field is declared on the environment surface and can be overridden per environment.
